---
title: "Decisions"
toc: true
listing:
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  type: table
  contents:
    - "decisions/**/*.md"
    - "!decisions/attachments/"
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title"
  feed: true
  fields: [title, date, tier, status, filename]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Title"
    date: "Date"
    tier: "Tier"
    status: "Status"
    filename: "File"
---
